title: OSF UI Settings Schema
description: Schema for settings/<author>.<modname>.json files. Bridge protocol 1.0.

$schema.description: Optional editor hint; ignored by the runtime.

id.description: Mod id: "<author>.<modname>" - lowercase [a-z0-9-] segments, exactly one dot. Dotless ids are reserved for the platform. Must equal the filename stem, so the file is settings/<author>.<modname>.json.

title.description: English card header shown in the settings view. Defaults to id. Translation catalogs override it at settings.title; authors do not write localization keys.

description.description: Optional English one-line blurb. Translation catalogs override it at settings.description.

version.description: Optional schema version (default 0). New mods should declare "version": 1 so migration stamping is active from their first release.

requires.description: Host capabilities this schema needs,. ["type:flags"]. Named capabilities share one vocabulary with the runtime.ready capabilities list (item 6): command-namespace names for surfaces (settings, settings.captureKey, views, game.calendar, gamepad), type:<t> for setting value types, schema:<feature> for schema mechanisms. A host that can't satisfy every entry registers the mod as a read-only stub card ('needs a newer OSF UI') and leaves the values file untouched; hosts older than this field ignore it entirely. Distinct from the per-SETTING requires (restart/reload/newGame).

accent.description: Optional per-mod accent colour (#rrggbb or #rrggbbaa). Tints the mod's detail pane.

icon.description: Optional badge image, shown in the Mods surface rail and inside the Home launcher cards of this mod's views, in place of the title-initials monogram. A path inside the mod's own views namespace folder (views/<modId>/...), with the same sandbox rules as image rows' `src`: no '..', no absolute paths, no URL schemes, no percent-encoding. SVG or PNG; drawn at ~30-52px square (`object-fit: contain`).

presets.description: Author-shipped value sets applied as a batch of settings. Partial value maps are fine - unlisted keys are left untouched.

id.description: Optional stable localization identity. Without it, the preset array index is used.

label.description: English preset button label; localized at presets.<id>.label.

description.description: Optional English tooltip; localized at presets.<id>.description.

values.description: key -> value map applied when the preset is chosen. Each value is validated/clamped natively like any settings.set.

inputContexts.description: Named key-binding contexts local to this mod. Referenced by key settings through inputContext. The implicit id gameplay is reserved and cannot be redefined.

id.description: Optional stable localization identity. Without it, the group array index is used.

label.description: Optional English section heading; localized at groups.<id>.label.

visibleWhen.description: Show the whole group only when this condition holds (display-only).

id.description: Context id local to this mod. gameplay is reserved for the implicit default context.

label.description: English context label, such as During OSF scenes. Defaults to id; localized at inputContexts.<id>.label.

blocksGameplay.description: Author assertion that Starfield gameplay bindings cannot fire while this context is active. Suppresses only @game conflict warnings; mod-to-mod collisions still warn and dispatch behavior is unchanged.

item.description: A row in a group: a value-bearing setting, or a static/action item (note/image/action).

key.description: Stable identifier, unique within the mod. Used as the persisted key and in settings.set/settings.reset.

aliases.description: Former keys this setting was persisted under (mcm-design.md §11). On load, if the current `key` is absent from the values file, the first listed alias whose stored value still validates is adopted, then rewritten under `key` (the old alias key drops). Declarative one-way rename; no version arithmetic. The current key always wins over an alias.

label.description: English control label. Defaults to key; localized at settings.<key>.label.

hint.description: Optional English helper text; localized at settings.<key>.hint.

type.description: Control + validation kind — the FROZEN base set (api-freeze-plan item 2). bool = toggle; int/float clamp to [min,max]; enum must be one of options; string truncates to maxLength (<=256 today, raised in the native slice); key = a rebindable key name captured by a press; flags = multi-select over options (value = array of option strings, filtered/deduped natively). Colour is NOT a type: use type:"string" + widget:"color". A host that predates a type renders it read-only and serves the schema default; the saved value is preserved untouched. A genuinely new base type must ship behind a schema-level requires: ["type:<t>"] gate.

default.description: Initial value, used until the user changes it and on reset. Should match the type. The 'modified' indicator compares the live value against this.

maxLength.description: string max length (UI hint; native ceiling is 256 today, up to 4096 in the native slice).

allowUnbound.description: key type only: permit "" as the deliberate unbound state (default "" is then legal). Unbound keys never dispatch hotkeys and never appear in conflicts; the settings UI renders an unbind × next to the capture button.

inputContext.description: key type only: local inputContexts id. Missing, invalid, or unknown ids fall back to implicit gameplay.

options.description: Allowed values for an enum or flags setting. An enum's stored value is always one of these strings; a flags value is an array drawn from them (canonicalized to this order).

optionLabels.description: Optional English labels parallel to options[]. Localized by stable stored value at settings.<key>.options.<option>; the stored value is never translated.

widget.description: Display hint (older runtimes ignore it and use the type default). int/float: slider (default) | stepper. enum: dropdown (default) | segmented. string: text (default) | textarea | color (swatch + #hex, stored as a hex string).

format.description: int/float display formatting. Store the raw value; show a friendly string. e.g. store 0.0-1.0 with {scale:100,suffix:"%",decimals:0} shows "85%".

prefix.description: English display prefix; localized at settings.<key>.format.prefix.

suffix.description: English display suffix; localized at settings.<key>.format.suffix.

scale.description: Multiply the stored value by this for display (default 1).

decimals.description: Fixed decimal places in the display string (0-20; clamped by the renderer).

requires.description: Marks that a change to this setting takes effect only after a game restart / overlay reload / new game. Shows a badge and aggregates into a banner.

visibleWhen.description: Show this row only when the condition holds (display-only; a hidden setting is still writable and still validated natively).

enabledWhen.description: Enable this control only when the condition holds (display-only).

id.description: Optional stable localization identity; without it, the item index is used.

text.description: English static rich text. Micro-markdown only: **bold**, *italic*, `code`, and \n line breaks. No HTML or links. Localized at notes.<id>.text.

id.description: Optional stable localization identity; without it, the item index is used.

src.description: Image path relative to the mod's own views/<id>/ folder. No '..', absolute paths, or URL schemes.

caption.description: Optional English caption; localized at images.<id>.caption.

height.description: Optional fixed display height in px.

label.description: English button label; localized at actions.<key>.label.

hint.description: Optional English helper text; localized at actions.<key>.hint.

command.description: Bridge command fired on click. MUST be namespaced with the mod id ("<id>.something"); the host refuses any other command. Handled by the mod's own SFSE plugin (RegisterCommand). It may reply with { type: "<id>.ack", payload: { key, ok, message? } } to resolve the button; otherwise the button times out after 5s.

confirm.description: English inline confirmation message; localized at actions.<key>.confirm.

condition.description: Display-only predicate over sibling setting values in the same mod. A leaf references one key with exactly one operator; combinators nest. A reference to an unknown key evaluates false.

in.description: key's value is one of these

truthy.description: true: key's value is truthy; false: falsy
